name: Alexandra Johnson
title: Senior Product Designer
headline: Senior Product Designer
summary: Results-driven Senior Product Designer with 8+ years of experience crafting intuitive digital experiences for high-growth startups and Fortune 500 companies. Proven track record of leading cross-functional teams and delivering products that increase user engagement by up to 40%. Passionate about human-centered design and bridging the gap between business goals and user needs.
keyHighlights: Led redesign of flagship mobile app, increasing DAU by 42% and reducing churn by 28%
Managed a team of 5 designers across 3 time zones, delivering projects on time and under budget
Established company-wide design system adopted by 20+ engineers across 4 product teams

description: Led end-to-end product design for a SaaS platform serving 200,000+ enterprise users
Collaborated with PMs and engineers to ship 12 major features in 18 months
Conducted 50+ user interviews and synthesized findings into actionable design improvements
achievements: Reduced onboarding drop-off rate by 35% through redesigned flow

description: Designed responsive web and mobile applications for 15+ clients across fintech and healthcare
Built and maintained a shared component library in Figma used across all client projects
Owned UX for consumer mobile app from concept to App Store launch
Ran weekly design critiques and mentored 2 junior designers

awards: Awwwards Site of the Day — CreativeFlow Portfolio Redesign (2020)
Nielsen Norman Group UX Certification with Distinction (2019)

extraSections.title: Volunteer Work
items: Design Mentor at ADPList — 200+ mentorship sessions with aspiring designers worldwide
Pro-bono UX consultant for 3 non-profits through Catchafire
